'''Jollie''' was an [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] who appears to have been attached to the staff of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Lynch Hauser]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

==Biography==
Jollie was working with [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Grigor (governor)|Grigor]] of [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]] in operating an illegal [[Dragite crystal]] mine, and informed Grigor that the Grand Moff was assigning an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer named [[Ranulf Trommer/Legends|Ranulf Trommer]] to secretly investigate him.

Jollie was a short, bald man who wore a monocle, carried a small rodent-like animal with him, and appeared to be a [[Cigarra/Legends|cigarra]] aficionado.

{{Char-stub}}

*[[River of Chaos 1|''River of Chaos'' 1]] {{1st}}
